appearanceDesc: Customize the look and feel of the application.
title: Project Settings
selectProject: Select a project from the Dashboard to configure settings.
budgetGovernanceDesc: Configure spending limits and alert thresholds for agent runs.
reviewPolicyDesc: Control how code reviews are triggered and what approval gates apply.
minRiskLevelForBlock: Min Risk Level to Block Merge
webhookConfigDesc: Configure webhook delivery for repository and review events.
operatorDiagnosticsDesc: Runtime availability and operational health overview.
customFieldsDesc: Define project-specific properties for task detail and workspace views.
formsDesc: Create intake forms that map to task properties and custom fields.
automationsDesc: Configure event-driven rules and inspect recent automation activity.
validationSummary: Fix validation errors before saving settings.
fallbackGovernanceDefaults: Fallback defaults are currently active for governance settings.
draftRuntimeChanged: Draft runtime selection differs from the last saved project settings.
runtimeReadySummary: Selected runtime is available for new tasks.
runtimeBlockedSummary: Selected runtime is currently blocked by diagnostics.
reviewManualApprovalEnabled: Manual approval is required after deep review.
reviewManualApprovalDisabled: Deep review can complete without manual approval.
webhookMissingUrlSummary: Webhook activation still needs a target URL.
webhookMissingEventsSummary: Webhook activation still needs at least one event.
webhookReadySummary: Webhook delivery is configured and ready.
